creator: mondo.debater_0q@icloud.com
text:
(In reply to huber.georg from comment #0)

Georg, sorry to hear you're having issues. This is the first time this has been reported here. The project's github page does include some reports of not being able to quit transmission on other platforms; however, there's insufficient information in those reports to determine if it's the same issue you're having. I would encourage you to open a bug report with the project. 

It's difficult to determine the cause of your issue from the information provided. Have you modified the peer limits in your transmission configuration file? Is there any relevant information in your logs? You can set transmission's log level by specifying the transmission_log_level variable in your rc.conf. Perhaps start by setting transmission_log_level=error.
